prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime illustration of two elegant young men standing in an opulent gothic rose ballroom, viewed from a slightly high angle with cinematic depth and glossy lighting. The left character, platinum blond, wears an ornate black formal suit with layered chains, embroidered lapels, rose brooches, rings, black gloves or wrist accessories, slim trousers, polished black shoes, and a dark burgundy cape lining; he stands confidently with one hand on his hip. The right character, dark navy black, wears an elaborate white princely suit with silver embroidery, ribbon-like tails, chain ornaments, a rose corsage, white gloves or pale sleeves, fitted trousers, and white dress shoes; he reaches one hand dramatically toward the viewer in the foreground. Cover each character’s face with a soft-edged square censor block in muted skin-tone brown, exactly 2 face-covering squares total, one over each face. Surround them with abundant deep red roses, falling rose petals, sparkling chandeliers, dangling crystal beads, dark velvet shadows, and a reflective black marble floor scattered with petals. Use a luxurious romantic fantasy mood for Rose Day, high-detail shoujo / otome game key visual style, dramatic rim light, glowing highlights, rich contrast, intricate costume details, elegant composition, no text, no watermark.
